code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant Client
    participant MatrixServer
    participant Federation
    participant Recipient
    participant Database

    User->>Client: Compose message
    Client->>Client: Encrypt (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
    Client->>MatrixServer: Send encrypted message
    MatrixServer->>MatrixServer: Store message
    MatrixServer->>Database: Persist to PostgreSQL
    MatrixServer->>Federation: Forward to recipient's server
    Federation->>Recipient: Deliver message
    Recipient->>RecipientClient: Push notification
    RecipientClient->>RecipientClient: Decrypt message
    RecipientClient->>Recipient: Display message

    Note over User,Recipient: End-to-End Encrypted Communication

repo_description: REChain ®️ 🪐 Platform encourages collaborative communication through features such as threads, allowing users to organize discussions and streamline conversations. The inclusion of polls enhances deci

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个端到端加密的消息流转图，场景是工业物联网场景，用户通过客户端发消息，经过Matrix服务器和联邦网络，最终到达接收方。核心是要体现IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController这个组件的加密处理。
明白了，参与方我梳理一下：User、Client、MatrixServer、Federation、Recipient，还需要数据库对吧？加密是在Client本地完成的，然后消息进入MatrixServer后要持久化存储。
对的，Database用PostgreSQL。另外Recipient那边应该有个RecipientClient来接收推送和解密，这样流程才完整。
好，我先画出主干流程：User在Client上Compose message，然后Client本地做Encrypt，标注上IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController。接着Send encrypted message到MatrixServer。
MatrixServer收到后要先Store message，然后Persist to PostgreSQL，这两个是内部动作。之后通过Federation Forward到接收方的服务器。
已添加。Federation到Recipient是Deliver message，然后RecipientClient收到Push notification，本地Decrypt message，最后Display message给Recipient。
检查一遍，Client那里的Encrypt是自循环对吧？还有RecipientClient的Decrypt也是自循环。最后加个Note说明这是End-to-End Encrypted Communication，覆盖User到Recipient的范围。
确认无误，Client-Client的自循环标注Encrypt (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)，RecipientClient-RecipientClient的自循环是Decrypt message，Note over User,Recipient已添加。整个端到端加密流程完整了。
